description: Style Notepeter england presents a wide range of efficient, everyday travel gear combined with impressive style. This laptop backpack from Peter England, specifically designed for work and weekend trips, strikes the right balance between convenience and style. The various compartments are a smart, neat and compact way to carry your laptop with all your essentials and is on the  top of our wishlist!Product DetailsTwo main zipped compartments, one with a laptop compartment that has a velcro closureOne zipped pocket on the front with organiser sleeves and a mesh zipped pocketTwo small zipped pockets on the front for enhanced spaceTwo zipped pockets on both sidesCompartment for a music player and an outlet for headphonesOne padded haul loop for carrying easeWide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying at ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesMesh back for ventilationLegs on the base for stabilityBranding on the frontMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Warranty: 6 monthsSizeHeight: 46 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 20 cm
